args.content:
# Hawaii Vacation Packing List

## Clothing
- Swimwear (2-3 sets)
- Beach cover-ups
- Casual outfits (t-shirts, shorts, sundresses)
- Light jacket or sweater (for cooler evenings)
- Sleepwear
- Undergarments
- Socks
- Flip-flops/sandals
- Walking shoes
- Hat/cap

## Toiletries
- Sunscreen (reef-safe)
- After-sun lotion
- Insect repellent
- Toiletries (toothbrush, toothpaste, shampoo, etc.)
- Medications
- First-aid kit

## Gear & Accessories
- Sunglasses
- Camera
- Phone and charger
- Portable power bank
- Snorkeling gear (mask and snorkel)
- Hiking gear (for Diamond Head hike)
- Reusable water bottle
- Beach bag
- Travel documents (passport, ID, flight tickets, hotel reservations)
- Credit cards and cash

## Activities-Specific Items
- For Hanauma Bay snorkeling: water shoes
- For Diamond Head hike: water bottle, light backpack
- For Luau: casual nice outfit
- For spa day: swimsuit (if using spa facilities)

## Electronics
- Phone
- Camera
- Chargers for all devices
- Universal adapter (if needed)
- Headphones

Have a wonderful vacation in Hawaii!

content.content:
I've created a comprehensive packing list for your Hawaii vacation! The file named "hawaii-packing-list" has been saved to your cloud drive. 

The list includes all essential items organized by category:
- Clothing (swimwear, casual outfits, footwear, etc.)
- Toiletries (sunscreen, medications, etc.)
- Gear & accessories (sunglasses, camera, travel documents)
- Activity-specific items for your planned activities like snorkeling at Hanauma Bay and hiking at Diamond Head
- Electronics

The list is based on your vacation itinerary from June 10-20, 2024, and includes recommendations for all the activities you have planned. I've also included some practical tips like bringing reef-safe sunscreen and a portable power bank.

You can access this file anytime from your cloud drive. Have a wonderful vacation in Hawaii!
